violations.text: The following non-food contact surfaces were observed with: 1) The fans in the walk-in cooler observed with an accumulation of dust 2) The shelving of the open display cooler was observed with white film/dust on the air vents near the ice cream chest cooler 3) The open display cooler in the protein drink aisle was observed with an accumulation of white film Non-food contact surfaces shall be cleaned as often as necessary. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the air cover vents in the walk-in cooler and the vents of open air coolers were observed with an accumulation of dust. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned as necessary. New Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2024
